title: EI EI EI
description: brings to Minecraft "Ei Ei Ei", "Oi, Oi Oi" and "Gedigedagedago"
body:
Originally made for a Dirrabloom's YouTube video. This mods brings several brainrot memes to Minecraft:

# **Ei Ei Ei:**
![ei ei ei](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fec2af0482ef566d7ca8d3cba84d45d22fdefc19.png)
- Health: 40
- Speed: 1.6
- Damage: 8
- Spawn: plains

# **Oi Oi Oi:**
![oi oi oi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ba4c6fbb7c0ab740cee9547d193d8987a44003.png)
- Health: 60
- Speed: 1.8
- Damage: 4
- Spawn: nether

# **Gedigedagedago:**
![gedigedagedago](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/114c487894efe6d3d3344396f880619f6d127aa3.png)
- Health: 30
- Speed: 1.4
- Damage: 10
- Spawn: savanna
